decision_scope: 非实施许可；供 S2 三 Agent 对抗复审。
objective: 保留治理真相与现有权威链，把重复治理计算、完整 JSON 与运行遥测从普通开发动作的 stdout/人工阅读路径中移出，降低 token 与重跑成本。
invariants: legacy validator remains sole authoritative pass/fail until later parity gates
不新增 CURRENT.md、SHIP.md、projectctl.py 或新的 current truth
双平面与三个中文人类入口保持；开发记录 Roadmap 合同不削弱
Project Governance workflow/job required-check 身份、contents: read、full/nightly/release gate 不变
未知路径或 Git/base/diff 错误 fail-closed
禁止写入 EEI/arxiv 和所有项目业务目录
proposed_shadow_features: check plan: 说明 changed paths 触发哪些检查及升级原因
pre/post zero-write: 检测验证器新增 tracked 写入；CI 保持严格 clean-start
compact stdout: 普通 fast gate 摘要 <= 2KB，错误/Acceptance/Evidence/rollback 不省略
full JSON evidence: 写 runner temp 或 .git/codex-review，不写 tracked 文件
stage timing telemetry: 记录阶段耗时、selected_project_count、render_count、stdout_bytes
candidate shadow: 只报告候选分类和节省量，不影响 legacy exit code 或 required result
non_goals: 不依赖 prompt 自报风险等级
不把 base/diff 错误解释为无变更
不引入未按内容 hash 和工具版本键控的 persistent cache
不修改项目业务 Roadmap 或业务代码
不把完整 Roadmap 或 current snapshot 复制到 README 形成新真相源

known_blockers_for_s2.reason: 当前 root governance selector mismatch 是 P1 false negative 风险；S2 必须裁决是否 FIX-ONE 前置。
required project root exclusions 需要等价 required coverage 或移除。

required_counterexamples: invalid base ref / unresolved diff must fail closed in changed-scope, ci, and candidate check plan
root governance file change must not produce selected_project_count>0 while validator checked none
0/1/8 selected project fixtures preserve legacy issue set and exit code
READ_ONLY/CI pre/post status remains clean even when validator would create cache files
unknown project render/check-render returns compact actionable non-traceback error
README remains entry-only and does not embed stale run snapshot or .git evidence path
two representative real commits/PR diffs run shadow without changing legacy decision
rollback: S3 shadow 可通过移除/关闭 candidate output 回滚；legacy 从未失去权威。后续有限激活必须单提交 revert 或 feature flag。
next_stage_gate: S2 must return PROCEED_SHADOW/FIX-ONE/STOP; PROCEED_SHADOW requires six reports, adjudicated P0/P1, zero tracked S1/S2 diff, and locked file/test/rollback scope.
